name: Minature Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Crust: Mix crumbs, sugar and margarine. Press a rounded measuring tablespoon of the crumb mixture into the bottom of each of 12 paper-lined muffin cups. Bake for 5 minutes.
3. Filling: Beat cream cheese, sugar, lemon peel juice and vanilla in an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Pour over crusts, filling each cup three-fourths full. Bake for 25 minutes. Cool before removing from pan. Refrigerate. Top with preserves just before serving.
